description: Use the N/url module to determine URL navigation paths within NetSuite and format URL strings.

methods.name: format
methods.description: Converts (serializes) URL query parameters into a string. Creates a serialized representation of an object containing query parameters. Use the returned value to build a URL query string.

params.name: options.params
params.description: Additional URL parameters as name/value pairs.

methods.name: resolveRecord
methods.description: Returns an internal URL to a NetSuite record.

params.name: options.recordType
params.description: The type of record. For example, 'purchaseorder'.

params.name: options.recordId
params.description: The record ID of the target record instance.

params.name: options.isEditMode
params.description: If set to true, returns a URL for the record in Edit mode. If set to false, returns a URL for the record in View mode. The default value is View.

params.name: options.params
params.description: Object used to add parameters for a custom URL.

methods.name: resolveScript
methods.description: Returns an external or internal URL to a RESTlet or Suitelet.

params.name: options.scriptId
params.description: The script ID (string) or internal ID (number) of the script. The ID must identify a RESTlet or a Suitelet.

params.name: options.deploymentId
params.description: The script ID (string) or internal ID (number) of the deployment script.

params.name: options.returnExternalUrl
params.description: Indicates whether to return the external URL. By default, the internal URL is returned (false).

params.name: options.params
params.description: The object containing name/value pairs to describe the query.

methods.name: resolveDomain
methods.description: Returns a domain name for a NetSuite account.

params.name: options.hostType
params.description: The type of domain name you want to retrieve. Set this value using the url.HostType enum.

params.name: options.accountId
params.description: The NetSuite account ID for which you want to retrieve data. If no account is specified, the system returns data on the account that is running the script.

methods.name: resolveTaskLink
methods.description: Returns the internal URL to a NetSuite tasklink.

params.name: options.id
params.description: The task ID for the tasklink.

params.name: options.params
params.description: The Map object containing name/value pairs to describe the query.

enums.name: HostType
enums.description: Holds the string values that describe a category of domain name. Use this enum to set the value of the hostType parameter of the url.resolveDomain(options) method.

members.name: FORM
members.description: The domain for forms hosted online, usually in Suitelets (.extforms.netsuite.com)

members.name: RESTLET
members.description: The domain for calling a RESTlet from an external source (.restlets.api.netsuite.com)

members.name: SUITETALK
members.description: The domain for SOAP web services requests (.suitetalk.api.netsuite.com)
